# William Felix

> Personal portfolio of William Felix — web developer and business system analyst in Medan, Indonesia. Six years of experience building and maintaining business-critical HR & payroll systems with PHP/Laravel, ASP.NET (C#), and Oracle/SQL Server databases.

Key facts:

- Current role: TD HR Associate Analyst at PT Wilmar Consultancy Services (Jun 2022 – present), developing and maintaining an HR/payroll platform used by companies across Indonesia
- Previous role: Web Developer & Business Analyst at PT Pundi Mas Berjaya (Sep 2020 – Jun 2022), building full-stack PHP/Laravel applications
- Education: Bachelor of Informatics Engineering, Universitas Mikroskil Medan (2018–2022), GPA 3.92/4.00
- Skills: PHP (Laravel), ASP.NET (C#), JavaScript, Golang, Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL, Git
- Languages: Indonesian (native), English (professional working proficiency)
- Contact: william.felix059@gmail.com
